info.title: PgQueryNarrative API
info.description: Data Storyteller AI - Convert PostgreSQL SQL queries to business narratives

post.description: Execute a SQL query and return results
Generate a narrative report from a SQL query

get.description: Return the list of allowed schemas with their tables and columns (from information_schema, read-only).
Return suggested SQL queries: curated examples plus saved queries matching optional intent.

parameters.name: intent
parameters.description: Optional natural-language intent (e.g. 'sales by region'); used to match saved queries.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of suggestions to return

get.description: Return saved queries semantically similar to the given text (embedding-based). Requires embeddings to be enabled.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Natural-language or SQL text to find similar queries for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of similar queries to return
